description: The Aston Martin DB7, produced from 1994 to 2004, was the model that saved Aston Martin. Initially powered by a supercharged 3.2-litre straight-six, the later Vantage variant received a 6.0-litre V12 producing 420 bhp. The V12 Vantage, particularly in manual guise, is the most collectible.
